title: Graph rules: coverage, reference-integrity, dependency-shape
description:
Implement the graph/aggregate rule kinds (coverage, reference-integrity, dependency-shape) over the whole issue store.

## Background

These rules need cross-issue context and run only in `jit validate` and gate checkers, never on write. See `dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine-plan.md` (step 6) and decision record sections 4.2 and 10.2.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] [hard] `label-coverage` asserts every canonical criterion id (from the description, with derived satisfies links) is satisfied by at least one child in a configurable state.
- [ ] [hard] `label-reference` asserts a `from` reference (for example `satisfies:X`) resolves to a declared source within a configurable scope.
- [ ] [hard] `dependency-shape` asserts a selector must or should depend on a target selector, evaluated over the dependency DAG.
- [ ] [hard] Graph rules operate over `store.list_issues()` and run only in validate/gate-checker contexts.

## Notes

Anchors: `IssueStore::list_issues` in `storage/mod.rs`; `DependencyGraph` in `graph.rs` (already used by `validate.rs`).
